ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Electronics Mart India Limited has announced the commercial commencement of a new 6,250 square foot multi-brand store in Gurugram, Haryana, effective June 29, 2026. This expansion, disclosed under SEBI (LODR) Regulations as a material event, signifies the company's ongoing growth strategy, aiming for increased market penetration and potential revenue generation. No red flags are apparent, as the announcement details a routine business expansion in line with typical retail sector development.
